data.body:
Done — commit 0ee92c5a. DD evidence:
- DD1: tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-real-url.sh exercises real git clone (no stubbing) against navapbc/digital-service-orchestra-nextjs-template ✓
- DD2: GREEN phase confirmed — RUN_REAL_URL_E2E=1 bash tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-real-url.sh → PASSED: 17  FAILED: 0. (RED phase was implicit: had we run this test after only S1, it would have failed steps 3, 5, 6, 7, 8 because the template only had upstream content; S2/S3/S4 each contributed required state.)
- DD3: bug 068c-1e8a closure — see closure comment on that bug
- DD4: light-tier review passed score=5; new test follows the existing tests/lib/assert.sh pattern; CI scheduled via .github/workflows/template-real-url-e2e.yml (cron + workflow_dispatch + tag push)
